title: Slap the Monster on Page One
original_title: Sbatti il mostro in prima pagina
overview: Days before the general election, after a girl from a rich family is murdered in an attempted rape, the editor-in-chief of a conservative tabloid tries to derail the police investigation in order to help the right-wing candidates supported by his bosses.

trailers.title: SBATTI IL MOSTRO IN PRIMA PAGINA di Marco Bellocchio (2024) - Trailer Ufficiale HD
